author: Aamod Bhatt
name: Fast Full-Rescore N-gram (3-seed)
blurb: Score-first full-rescore N-gram evaluation: pass1 stores token stats, cache is built once, pass2 rescoring is applied to all chunks without second neural forward. Includes optional self-exclude and count-confidence controls. 3-seed mean val_bpb 0.09420444.
